implemented: Options language switch closes side menu immediately and updates current card language.
German TTS preprocessing extended for etw, etw., etw/, jdn., Akk./Dat. and case markers in brackets/parentheses.
Static UI labels excluded from TTS path.
Exact stored/displayed synonym counts enforced: verbs 4, others 2.
Synonyms displayed directly below the main German word.
German headword constrained to one line with dynamic font fitting.
limitations: The app enforces exact synonym counts from available dataset fields, but cannot verify 99% semantic match offline without a semantic API.
Exact Microsoft/Azure voice output is still limited by which voices the browser exposes.
